question: What specific named datasets or benchmarks were used to evaluate or test this AI model?
keywords: evaluation benchmark test dataset tested evaluated assessment validation
description: Per SPDX 3.0.1 testedOn relationship: identifies the specific datasets or benchmarks used to evaluate the AI model. Examples include GLUE, SuperGLUE, MMLU, HellaSwag, etc. Maps to SPDX testedOn relationship and CycloneDX modelCard.datasets with type=evaluation.

retrieval.hypothetical_passage:
## Evaluation

We evaluate on the GLUE and SuperGLUE benchmarks, MMLU (5-shot), HellaSwag, ARC-Challenge, and TruthfulQA. For multilingual capability we report XNLI and FLORES-200. Code generation is measured on HumanEval and MBPP. Results are reported as accuracy or pass@1 against the held-out test split of each benchmark; we did not tune hyperparameters on the evaluation sets.

extraction.instruction: Extract the named datasets or benchmarks used to evaluate this AI model. Return only the canonical dataset names, comma-separated.
extraction.field_spec: AIkaBoOM-internal. Value space: a list of dataset/benchmark names (canonical short forms preferred, e.g. `GLUE`, `MMLU`, `HumanEval`). Maps to SPDX `testedOn` relationship and CycloneDX `modelCard.datasets` with `type=evaluation`.
extraction.output_guidance: Return concrete dataset names only; exclude generic phrases like 'an internal test set' unless that is the only signal. Preserve official capitalization (e.g. `SQuAD`, `HellaSwag`). De-duplicate across sections. If evaluation is mentioned but no dataset is named, return 'noAssertion'. If evaluation is not discussed at all, return 'Not found.'. Do not include training datasets here.
